# SVGSource

A serialized SVG contract accepted anywhere the frontend package supports server-provided icons.

## Usage

Use `SVGSource` for trusted SVG markup delivered as application data. Prefer ordinary Vue icon components when the icon is known at build time. The package's Icon renderer parses the source and renders its SVG attributes and children.

```typescript
import type { SVGSource } from '@stacktrace/ui'

const icon: SVGSource = {
  src: '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">...</svg>',
}
```

## Security

Treat serialized SVG as executable markup. Only render sources produced by the application or another trusted system; do not pass arbitrary user input.

## `SVGSource`

Wraps serialized SVG markup so it can be distinguished from a Vue component icon.

```typescript
interface SVGSource {
  src: string
}
```

| Property | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `src` (required) | `string` | Contains a complete serialized SVG element. |

Hosted documentation: [SVGSource](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/types/svg-source)
